summary: Spatial Layout Canvas (2D Modular Planning) - All backend tests passed (19/19). Frontend UI verified with screenshots showing canvas with grid, module library, properties panel, summary footer, and BOQ generation.
passed_tests: GET /api/spatial/module-library - Returns 200 with module_types, finish_types, shutter_types
Module library has 10 module types (base_cabinet, wall_cabinet, tall_unit, loft_unit, appliance_hob, appliance_chimney, appliance_microwave, appliance_oven, appliance_dishwasher, appliance_sink)
Module library has 6 finish types (laminate, acrylic, pu_paint, veneer, membrane, glass)
Module library has 5 shutter types (flat, profile, glass, handleless, shaker)
All module types have required fields (name, category, default_width, default_height, default_depth, unit)
POST /api/projects/{project_id}/spatial-layout - Creates layout with walls and modules
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/spatial-layout - Lists all layouts for project
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/spatial-layout?room_name=Kitchen - Filters by room name
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/spatial-layout/{layout_id} - Returns layout detail with summary
PUT /api/projects/{project_id}/spatial-layout/{layout_id} - Updates layout
Layout summary has correct calculations (total_wall_length_mm, module_count, total_material_sqft, total_estimated_cost)
POST /api/projects/{project_id}/spatial-layout/{layout_id}/generate-boq - Generates BOQ items from modules
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/modular-boq - Returns generated BOQ items
Invalid project returns 404
Invalid layout returns 404
Generate BOQ with invalid layout returns 404
Empty layout creation works (no walls, no modules)
UI: Spatial Canvas page loads at /projects/{id}/spatial-boq
UI: Module Library panel shows all 10 module types with dimensions
UI: Canvas displays grid with walls and modules
UI: Properties panel shows 'Select an item to edit' when nothing selected
UI: Summary footer shows Walls count, Modules count, Cabinet Length, Material Area, Est. Cost
UI: Summary modal opens with layout metrics
UI: Generate BOQ button generates BOQ items with success toast
UI: Project Details page has 'Spatial Canvas' button in BOQ section
seed_data_creation: Created test layouts with walls (3000mm + 2500mm = 5500mm) and Base Cabinet module for project proj_4aaba062
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spatial Layout Canvas (2D Modular Planning) fully implemented and tested. Features verified: 1) GET /api/spatial/module-library returns 10 module types, 6 finish types, 5 shutter types, 2) CRUD operations for spatial layouts work correctly, 3) Auto-calculation of wall length, cabinet length, material area, estimated cost, 4) BOQ generation from layout modules, 5) UI shows canvas with grid, module library panel, properties panel, summary footer. Test project proj_4aaba062 has layout with 2 walls (5500mm) and 1 Base Cabinet module (₹10,196 estimated cost).

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/spatial/module-library: Returns module types, finish types, shutter types
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/projects/{project_id}/spatial-: Create layout with walls and modules

frontend_ui.header: Spatial Layout Canvas title, room selector, Summary/Export/Generate BOQ/Save buttons
frontend_ui.left_toolbar: Select tool, Draw Wall tool, Add Module tool, Zoom In/Out
frontend_ui.module_library_panel: 10 module types with color indicators and default dimensions
frontend_ui.canvas: SVG canvas with grid pattern, walls with dimension labels, modules with type labels
frontend_ui.properties_panel: Module type, Width/Height/Depth inputs, Finish Type dropdown, Shutter Type dropdown, Position X/Y
frontend_ui.summary_footer: Walls count (total mm), Modules count, Cabinet Length (mm), Material Area (sqft), Est. Cost (₹)
